reviews.comment:
Stepping into coffee Island feels like an escape from the busy world outside. The ambiance is simply wonderful warm and inviting, with soft, ambient lighting, Whether you're catching up with a friend or looking for a cozy corner to work, the different seating options cater to every need.

The coffee itself is excellent and clearly made with care.The Cappuccino expertly prepared, with a rich, smooth flavor that was a real treat.

The presentation was lovely as well, & coffee was too good, thanks Azhar a man himself is genuine, & made may day wonderful.
Thanks Azhar.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you! So glad you loved the European coffee experience right where you're at. We’ll keep the brews bold and the vibes just right, see you again soon!

reviews.comment: The place is clean and has nice ambience. I spent 30 mins to take a coffee but conversation with the person taking the order and making the order took me away and I loved it. He made Vietnamese shakerato and was perfect. The location in the mall is also perfect and lots of seating around. When you go next time to the mall stop at this place. They have good descent options of snacking and cakes as well.

reviewReply.comment: We’re delighted to know you enjoyed your time with us, from the coffee to the conversations! It’s always our goal to make every visit feel personal and memorable. Thank you for appreciating the ambience and location; we look forward to welcoming you again for more great brews and bites. ☕✨

reviews.comment: I absolutely loved the single estate Ethiopia pour over, the raspberry notes were very prominent. Thank you Azhar for your recommendation and excellent service

reviewReply.comment: Thank you for sharing your experience! We’re delighted to know you enjoyed the Ethiopia Single Estate pour-over, its vibrant raspberry notes do make it a standout. It’s always a pleasure to hear that our brews hit the mark. Looking forward to welcoming you back for more great coffee moments! ☕

reviews.name: accounts/100486096577551952970/locations/10866130483095140789/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25oak5pMVJVVlJTZFdSaFpETm1PR054U20xYVIxRRAB

reviews.comment: Went to this new coffee shop in Amanora mall. The person who took the order greeted us to a warm welcome. Told him clearly I need a strong, bitter and hot coffee. Any suggestions from his special coffee. He suggested Spanish Bombon. No issues with spending Rs 326 for a nice cup of coffee. But what came to my table was a 30ml coffee shot- half of which was foam. The rest (15ml- no exaggeration here) was a cold sugary syrup. They call it coffee here. This has to be the worst ever coffee I have drank in my entire life. Disgusting coffee and pathetic place to drink coffee if you are a coffee lover. Do not spend your hard earned money here. Extremely overpriced and poor quality coffee. I can see a similar review for the same coffee in the google reviews. I hope the owner is listening….

reviewReply.comment: Thank you for sharing your feedback. We truly value you taking the time to express your experience, and we understand how disappointing this must have felt. We’ve taken note of your comments and have already initiated an internal review with our team to address the concerns around the Spanish Bombon. Our goal is to ensure every cup meets both our quality standards and your expectations.We’d appreciate the chance to connect directly and learn more about your experience, please reach out to us via DM on Instagram @coffee.island.in or write to hello@coffeeisland.in.Your feedback helps us do better, and we genuinely appreciate it.

reviews.comment: Wasn’t sure what to expect from an orange-flavored coffee, but Azhar at Coffee Island convinced me to give it a shot — and man, that was worth it! 🍊 The citrus twist hits first, then the coffee kicks in smooth and strong. It’s different, refreshing, and honestly kind of addictive. Great job, Azhar!

reviewReply.comment: Five stars and a whole lot of love, grateful for your support!

reviews.comment:
Visited this newly built cafe in Amanora. Great decor and atmosphere.
However did not like their coffee collection.
Unreasonable pricing of a small shot of coffee. Its called Spanish Bombon made with a spoon of condensed milk,  half a expresso shot and milk foam. It comes in a really small cup. It is like a shot. The price is 310 for this. We wanted to order Chai as well but it is made out of tea bag so why even keep it in the menu if you cant make the tea. The coffee is not available in all sizes. So disappointed with that as well.

reviewReply.comment:
Hi Sukriti,
We appreciate your thoughts on your recent visit. The Spanish Bombón is indeed served as a condensed short coffee experience, and we understand it may not have matched your expectations. Your feedback on tea and menu sizing has been noted, and we’re looking into it. We’re glad you liked the atmosphere and hope you’ll visit us again to explore other beverages we offer.
